title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The mechanic has just repaired my car.
questions.explanation: Tests causative 'have' in the present perfect.

questions.firstSentence: ‘Don’t forget to lock the door,’ said my mother.
questions.explanation: Tests reporting verbs with infinitive structures.

questions.firstSentence: If you don't work harder, you will fail the exam.
I am sure they were exhausted after the long flight.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect for positive deduction.

questions.firstSentence: The bus service is very unreliable, so I prefer to walk.
I’d rather you didn't smoke in the house.
questions.explanation: Tests preference structures and infinitive vs. clause patterns.
